title: Did Core & Main’s Nearly 30% Post-Earnings Stock Drop Set Up an $18 Million Entry?
author: Jonathan Ponciano
description: Tribune Investment Group established a new position in Core & Main during Q3, acquiring 335,000 shares valued at approximately $18.03 million. The purchase came amid a brutal 27% post-earnings selloff, representing 8.74% of Tribune's assets under management. Despite underperforming the S&P 500, the company's operational metrics remain solid with strong cash generation and disciplined capital returns, suggesting patient capital sees long-term value in the infrastructure-focused distributor.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Despite a 27% post-earnings decline, the company demonstrates solid operational fundamentals with 1.2% YoY sales growth, expanding gross margins (27.2%), strong net income ($143M), and robust operating cash flow ($271M). The institutional investment by Tribune Investment Group during the selloff suggests confidence in long-term value, and the company's exposure to aging water infrastructure provides resilience. Shares have already recovered ~7% since earnings.

title: infinitii ai reports 12% FY2025 revenue growth, 21% loss decrease and launches new mobile and dashboard solutions to drive sales expansion
author: Prnewswire
description: Infinitii Ai reported a 12% revenue increase and 21% loss reduction in fiscal year 2025, launching new mobile and dashboard technologies to drive sales expansion in water infrastructure and predictive analytics markets.

title: KODA Integrates with Bitcoin Staking Chain Core, Paving the Way for Increased Institutional Adoption in Korea
author: Globe Newswire
description: KODA, the largest custody provider in South Korea, has integrated with Core, the first Proof of Stake (PoS) layer for Bitcoin and the largest Bitcoin DeFi ecosystem. This integration marks a significant step forward in expanding Bitcoin DeFi in Korea, setting the stage for greater adoption and innovation in the space.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: KODA is the leading custody provider in South Korea and is integrating with Core, which is a significant step forward in expanding Bitcoin DeFi in the region.

Core is the first Proof of Stake (PoS) layer for Bitcoin and the largest Bitcoin DeFi ecosystem, and its integration with KODA marks a significant milestone in enhancing Bitcoin's scalability and utility for institutional investors in Korea.

title: Bitcoin Staking Layer Core Expands Dual BTC Staking in Asia with Cobo Integration
author: N/A
description: Core, a Bitcoin PoS layer and DeFi ecosystem, has partnered with Cobo, a leading APAC institutional custodian, to enable Cobo's clients to access Core's Dual BTC Staking model and other Bitcoin DeFi features. This collaboration aims to drive institutional adoption of Bitcoin staking and provide sustainable Bitcoin yields.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article highlights Core's leadership in the Bitcoin PoS and DeFi ecosystem, as well as its collaboration with Cobo to drive institutional adoption of Bitcoin staking and provide sustainable Bitcoin yields.
